item.name: Dumplingfish
item.description:
Easily identified by its outsized dorsal fin, this wavekin of Marsh Ligaka is a staple food among the Hanuhanu.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This freshwater wavekin plies the waters of Marsh Ligaka with the aid of its large dorsal fin. The Hanuhanu, who use this fish to prepare a variety of delicious dumplings, gave it a fitting (if not slightly on the nose) name, that all who encounter it might learn of its culinary uses.
